business_problem: Clinic staff need a safe appointment administration prototype that separates patient booking from doctor/admin review, lets patients choose a date, doctor, and available slot, keeps one shared SQLite workflow, and records testing, CI/CD, Docker, deployment, and AI generation evidence.

safety_boundary.human_review: Doctor or admin staff must confirm, cancel, or reschedule appointment requests with an administrative review note.

storage.git_policy: Runtime database files are ignored and recreated automatically.

features: Role-based demo login and self-registration with hashed credentials and doctor-profile linking
Patient booking dashboard with selected-date doctor roster, doctor-specific availability, slot picker, and booking summary
Doctor dashboard scoped to the linked doctor queue, day-board, audit events, profile management, and own review decisions
Admin dashboard for all queues plus doctor account/profile creation and management
Weekday, future-date, doctor-shift, clinic-hours, slot-increment, capacity, and allowed-type validation
Patient cancellation endpoint, patient pending-request reschedule endpoint, scoped doctor review/reschedule endpoints, and admin-wide review/reschedule endpoints

ai_tooling.generated_image: APIFREE hero image and fictional doctor roster photo generation with deterministic fallback
ai_tooling.validation: Structured metadata, test suite, and submission validation script
